office.desc: Professional infrastructure for maximum productivity. Certified cabling, racks and VoIP.

processPage.label: How we work
processPage.title: Your installation step by
processPage.subtitle: A clear, professional and transparent process — from the first consultation to final handover with certification.

steps.title: Free consultation
steps.desc: We contact you, analyze your needs and arrange a free technical visit to the space.

steps.title: Technical survey
steps.desc: We visit the site, measure, assess existing infrastructure and design the optimal solution.

steps.title: Detailed quote
steps.desc: We deliver a clear, detailed quote with materials, labor and timelines. No surprises.

steps.title: Professional installation
steps.desc: Our team executes the installation with top-quality materials and impeccable finishes.

steps.title: Certification & testing
steps.desc: We certify every network point with Fluke equipment. We verify speed, continuity and standards compliance.

steps.title: Handover & support
steps.desc: We deliver complete documentation, train the team and offer post-installation technical support.

guarantee1.title: 5-year warranty
guarantee1.desc: Materials and workmanship covered for five full years.

guarantee2.title: Certification included
guarantee2.desc: Every network point certified with deliverable Fluke report.

guarantee3.title: Response in 24h
guarantee3.desc: Quote and technical assistance within one business day.

processPage.ctaSubtitle: Request your free consultation — we visit, measure and quote at no obligation.

aboutPage.label: About us
aboutPage.title: Meet
aboutPage.subtitle: Over 10 years connecting homes, offices and businesses in Barcelona with top-quality network infrastructure.
aboutPage.storyP1: CableCore was born with a clear mission: to offer professional-quality network installations at a fair price in Barcelona and surroundings.
aboutPage.storyP2: With over 500 installations completed, we've become the go-to reference for businesses and individuals needing reliable, lasting connectivity.
aboutPage.storyP3: Every project is unique — from an apartment with 4 network points to enterprise infrastructure with a server room. We adapt to your needs with custom solutions.

values.title: Excellence
values.desc: Every installation meets the highest standards of quality and professional certification.

values.title: Transparency
values.desc: Clear quotes with no surprises. You know exactly what you pay and why.

values.title: Efficiency
values.desc: We meet deadlines. 24h response, fast and clean installation.

values.title: Full warranty
values.desc: 5-year warranty on all installations. Your investment is protected.

values.title: Local presence
values.desc: We're local. Based in Barcelona, providing close, personal support.

values.title: Technology
values.desc: Top-quality materials and professional Fluke certification equipment.

aboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Get in touch — we're here to help with your network project.

contactPage.subtitle: We're at your service. Contact us by phone, WhatsApp, email or fill in the form — we respond within 24 hours.
